title: O'Reilly Automotive Sees Jump in Sales to Pros As Stretched Consumers Repair Old Cars
text: Consumers are keeping their cars longer than ever these days amid a sharp decline in the number of new cars available and the higher cost of purchasing them due to rising interest rates and supply chain snags.

title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.23% and 0.92%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., July 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) ( Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, today announced record revenue for its second quarter ended June 30, 2022.

title: Things to Consider Ahead of O'Reilly's (ORLY) Q2 Earnings
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for O'Reilly's (ORLY) Q2 earnings and revenues is pegged at $8.99 per share and $3.71 billion, respectively.

title: As America swelters, these stocks could be heat wave winners
text: The U.S. continues to swelter under a record-breaking heat wave that has sparked multiple heat advisories. Several high temperature records were broken on Sunday, including in Boston and Providence, while Hartford tied its record, according to the National Weather Service.

title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: O'Reilly Automotive Shifts into High Gear
text: This leading auto parts retailer is poised for long term growth as the nation's aging cars require extra TLC (and more parts).

title: Why O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) is a Top Growth Stock for the Long-Term
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Auto Retail Parts Industry Sunny Side Up: 4 Stocks in Focus
text: ORLY, AZO, KMX and AAP should be on your watchlist to cash in on the promising prospects of the auto retail parts industry backed by the soaring popularity of high-tech cars and ramp-up of e-commerce activities.

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Announces Dates for Its Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., July 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) (Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, announces the release date for its second quarter 2022 results as Wednesday, July 27, 2022, with a conference call to follow on Thursday, July 28, 2022.
